=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=
     SUMMARY FOR STORY "Paragate" by SavantGuarde:
=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=
 > Word count is 211,103.
 > There are 5 acts, 53 chapters, and 160 scenes.
 > This manuscript averages:
   - 1319 words per scene.
   - 3983 words per chapter.
   - 3.01 scenes per chapter.
 > Out of 160 planned scenes, 160 are written.
 > So the Zero Draft is approximately 100.0% complete.

recommended_usage.prose: Best for exact chapter/scene text lookup and quote retrieval.
recommended_usage.indexed: Best for direct chapter ID lookup using A##C## keys.
recommended_usage.chapters: Best for chapter-level summaries, structure, and continuity checks.
recommended_usage.scenes: Best for scene-level reasoning, emotional turns, setting queries, and editorial analysis.
